rawIntent:
[Feature: Build the leave management module — Phase 9: Leave — model and repository]

Create src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts: import LeaveRequest, LeaveRequestStatus, CreateLeaveRequestDto, UpdateLeaveRequestDto, LeaveRequestQueryParams from src/shared/types/index.ts (Phase 1). Define the LeaveRequest state machine transitions (DRAFT→SUBMITTED→APPROVED|REJECTED, plus CANCELLED from DRAFT|SUBMITTED|APPROVED). Create src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts: implement PgLeaveRepository extending BaseRepository from src/shared/base-repository.ts (Phase 1). Define ILeaveRequestRepository with findByEmployee(employeeId, queryParams), findByApprover(approverId), findPending, updateStatus(id, status, approvedBy, approvedAt). Depends on src/shared/types/index.ts (Phase 1) and src/shared/base-repository.ts (Phase 1). Include Jest unit tests in tests/unit/modules/leave/.

This phase depends on: Phase 1.

Phase architecture notes:
Establishes the LeaveRequest persistence layer. The repository's updateStatus method enforces valid state transitions. The orchestration service in Phase 10 will consume this repository alongside all other module services.

Detailed phase architecture (architecture-agent):

successCriteria.description: src/modules/leave/leave.model.ts exists and exports LEAVE_REQUEST_TRANSITIONS, isValidTransition, and re-exports LeaveRequest, CreateLeaveRequestDto, UpdateLeaveRequestDto, LeaveRequestStatus, LeaveRequestQueryParams from shared types.
src/modules/leave/leave.repository.ts exists and exports ILeaveRequestRepository and PgLeaveRequestRepository.
PgLeaveRequestRepository extends BaseRepository<LeaveRequest> and implements ILeaveRequestRepository.
ILeaveRequestRepository includes methods: findByEmployee(employeeId, queryParams), findByApprover(approverId), findPending(), updateStatus(id, status, approvedBy?, approvedAt?).
updateStatus enforces valid state transitions using isValidTransition; throws on invalid transition.
updateStatus writes an audit record (action: 'SUBMIT', 'APPROVE', 'REJECT', or 'CANCEL' as appropriate) in the same database transaction as the status update.
PgLeaveRequestRepository.create (inherited from BaseRepository) writes an audit record (action: 'CREATE') in the same transaction.
All repository methods use parameterized queries via this.pool to prevent SQL injection.
tests/unit/modules/leave/leave.repository.test.ts exists and all tests pass using Jest, covering valid transitions, invalid transitions, and audit record creation.

constraints: Repository pattern: All database access goes through repository interfaces.
Audit records: All state-changing operations write an audit record.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Phase 10 — Leave — service, controller, and routes
Integration with other modules (employee, policy, balance, notification)
